title: Understanding cancer at a genetic level with AI
summary: Dr. Daudi Jjingo's team at Makerere University uses AlphaFold, AlphaGenome, and Antigravity to identify genetic targets for breast cancer vaccine development in Uganda. The tools enabled analysis of 15,000 potential binding sites on a highly expressed cancer protein, narrowing candidates to 15 viable targets for validation using minimal computational infrastructure.
